chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-3389 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.15058/2022 2. For hearing of main case 18.02.2026. Mr. Ali Almani, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Mukesh Kumar, Advocate for the Department. Mr. Javed Ali, Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Muhammad Bilal, Advocate for the Respondent No.4. --------------- Learned counsel in attendance jointly seek disposal of this Petition in terms of the Order dated 27.01.2025 made by a learned Divisional Bench of this Court in C.P No. D-2848/2020 and connected cases. By consent, so ordered. As such the Petitioner may submit reply to the impugned show-cause notices and the same shall be determined by the Department after providing opportunity of hearing to the Petitioners. During pendency of such adjudication, no coercive action to be taken against the Petitioners. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
